# [Product Name] - Product Brief

<!--
PURPOSE: This document captures the stable, functional description of your product.
It answers "What is this product?" and should change infrequently.

SCOPE: Product-level context that persists across project increments.
Project-specific content (team, timeline, risks) belongs in project-plan.md.

UPDATES: Revise when the product itself evolves, not when projects start/end.
-->

- What is this product?
- Who is it for?
- What problem does it solve?
-->

[Product summary here]

## Vision & Mission

Aspirational future state. Where is this product going?
Example: "A world where every developer ships secure code by default."

### Mission

How we achieve the vision. What we do day-to-day.
Example: "We provide automated security scanning integrated into CI/CD pipelines."
-->

[Mission statement]
